hero.subtext: Professional async image generation with wallet-based billing, multi-token management, and S3 storage. Built for developers who ship fast.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From sign-up to image URL in six clean steps.

01.title: Sign up
01.desc: Create your account and receive 3 free trial generations instantly.

02.title: Get token
02.desc: Auto-generate your first API token on onboarding. Create more anytime.

03.title: Add balance
03.desc: Top up your wallet with $10 minimum. Only charged on successful jobs.

04.title: Send request
04.desc: POST to /v1/generate with your prompt, mode, and optional image.

05.title: Poll status
05.desc: Receive a job_id. Poll /v1/jobs/:id every 2 seconds until complete.

06.title: Receive image
06.desc: Get the S3 image URL. Wallet deduction finalizes only at this point.

pricing.title: Pay only for what you generate
pricing.subtitle: Wallet-based. Only charged on successful jobs. Failed jobs cost nothing.
pricing.note: Minimum wallet top-up $10 · Only $10 multiples accepted

hero.title: Simple, usage-based pricing
hero.subtitle: No subscriptions. No hidden fees. Load your wallet and pay per generation. Failed jobs are always free.

1k.name: 1K Mode
1k.desc: Fast standard resolution. Great for prototyping, thumbnails, and high-volume use cases.

2k.name: 2K Mode
2k.desc: High-resolution output. Ideal for print, detailed renders, and premium applications.

items.async: Async job system — poll at your pace

table.title: Usage examples
table.subtitle: What does your budget get you?

q1.a: Only when a job completes successfully and an image_url is returned. If a job fails or is rejected by moderation, your wallet is not touched.

q2.a: The minimum wallet top-up is $10. Top-ups are only accepted in multiples of $10 (e.g. $10, $20, $30, $50, $100).

q3.q: What happens if my job fails?
q3.a: Nothing. Failed jobs — due to timeouts, server errors, or moderation blocks — do not deduct any balance from your wallet.

q4.a: Wallet balance is generally non-refundable. For exceptional cases, please contact our support team and we'll review your request.

q5.a: No. Your wallet balance never expires. Top up once, use it whenever you need.

q6.q: What is the difference between modes?
q6.a: 1K mode generates 1024×1024 images at $0.01 per request. 2K mode generates 2048×2048 images at $0.02 per request. Both use the same underlying model.

moderation.title: Moderation system
moderation.desc: Built-in illegal content detection blocks harmful prompts before generation.
